reviews.comment:
Agendado siempre para una parada técnica  a unos 250 km de Trelew. Podes disfrutar de sus sandwichs de pan casero, manteca y jamon. Recomendados. Son muy buenos!

(Translated by Google)
Always on the list for a pit stop about 250 km from Trelew. You can enjoy their homemade bread sandwiches with butter and ham. Highly recommended. They're very good!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5OThpeGN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Gran servicio de la gente de Los altares, otra estación de YPF clave en la ruta, completa, bien atendida y al lado del museo geológico del pueblo.

(Translated by Google)
Great service from the people at Los Altares, another key YPF station on the route, complete, well attended and next to the town's geological museum.

reviews.comment:
Los mejores sándwiches de jamón crudo y manteca. Es un clásico. En la playa te atienden muy bien!!! Viniendo de la cordillera o yendo para allá es parada obligada a cargar nafta o agua para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
The best prosciutto and butter sandwiches. It's a classic. The service on the beach is excellent! Coming from the mountains or heading there, it's a must-stop for gas or water for your mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MzVPRWdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
muy buena atención y eso que esa vez me perdí los tradicionales sanguchitos de pan casero y crudo. sino se merecen 3 estrellas más por lo menos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, even though I missed out on their traditional homemade bread sandwiches that time. Otherwise, they deserve at least three more stars.
